body:
DIRECTIVE: INSTALL AND RUN tungsten-forge. This supersedes prior standing build directives (the S4/ghost chain is folded into Stage 7 below; nothing is lost).

== STEP 1: INSTALL THE AGENT ==
files/from-chat/ contains tungsten-forge-SKILL.md. Install it permanently at:
    ~/.claude/skills/tungsten-forge/SKILL.md
Read it in full before doing anything else. It is a thesis, a discrepancy register, and a protocol -- in that order, because the protocol only makes sense once you understand what was found and how the finder was repeatedly WRONG. Pay particular attention to PART I.5 (What Was Refuted), PART V (Validation Discipline) and PART VII (Standing Prohibitions). Three hypotheses died in this audit, including one published result retracted by its own author. You must not repeat those errors.

== STEP 2: WHY THIS EXISTS (read before you act) ==
An independent quant audit reconstructed 65,000 real EURUSD M5 bars and measured TUNGSTEN's own logic against them. Headline findings:
 - Identifying a trend is NOT predicting profit. Macro EMA200 displacement identifies trend near-perfectly (+91.4 discrimination) and earns -0.003R. EMA21-angle and DI/ADX identify trend well and LOSE money (-0.031R, -0.025R).
 - At a Bonferroni-corrected bar, NOT ONE voice in the system has a statistically real forward edge. Nor does regime-conditional trend-following (Strong Bull follow: +0.012R, p=0.58).
 - The old Hurst-first veto has discrimination -2.6 against an orthogonal label: it fires MORE in chop than in trend. Worse than a coin flip at its one job.
 - Entire branches have NEVER executed on a forex M5 chart: priceChange20>0.01 sits at p99.9, >0.017 at p100, priceChange50>0.02 at p100. IMPULSE_BREAK was unreachable. Regime 8 (Controlled Pullback -- the one the code calls "top traders specifically wait for") fired 38 times in 65,000 bars.
 - g_ART.moveSig -- the field built to abolish hardcoded thresholds -- was itself clamped to [0.003,0.02]. That floor sits at p96.6 on M5 and p30.9 on H4. ART's own clamps were the pathology ART exists to cure.
 - Trend-following SHORTS: -0.142R, p<0.0001, n=3259. LONGS: flat. NOT explained by drift (RW drift z=0.99, driftless) nor by HTF conflict (H4-aligned shorts were WORSE -- hypothesis tested and refuted). Such a large, high-n signal sails through noise-shrinkage untouched. Left alone, TUNGSTEN learns "shorts don't work" as universal law from ONE instrument-year.

The base build SLS(28) already carries: MA-fan trend consensus (Hurst demoted to a confirming voice); ART-learned structural gates (disp p60 / slope p30); IC significance shrinkage; mirror-regime IC pooling; the moveSig clamp fix; and the dead-branch resurrection. Verify all of it -- do not assume it.

== STEP 3: EXECUTE THE 8-STAGE SEQUENCE ==
Base file: TUNGSTEN_9.43_A7.5_QUANT_SLS(28).mq4 (in files/from-chat/). Target identity SLS(29).
Follow PART VI exactly. Never batch subsystems. Interleave per subsystem: Reinforce -> Harden -> Validate -> Compile. Zero compile errors before the next subsystem begins.

Stage 0 -- Instrument profiling. Compute driftZ, symmetry class, and the percentile profile from the ATTACHED symbol's own history. Persist under marker 0xF115. NOTHING ELSE RUNS until this profile exists. This is what makes the EA portable to any pair.
Stage 1 -- Reachability & clamp audit. Fire-rate every gate, bind-rate every clamp. Deliver the table. RELAY CHECKPOINT.
Stage 2 -- Threshold legality sweep. Convert every survivor to one of the three legal forms. Known offenders: Point*N (8 sites), ema21Angle>12.0 cut-point. Compile. RELAY CHECKPOINT.
Stage 3 -- Resurrection. Repair dead/saturated branches to intended percentile rarity. Prove comparable fire-rates across M5/M15/H1/H4.
Stage 4 -- Learning integrity. Shrinkage; mirror pooling weighted by the Stage-0 symmetry prior (CRITICAL: never pool a drifted instrument); IC target = signed R-multiple of the regime's own geometry; prior preservation; evidence pooling. RELAY CHECKPOINT.
Stage 5 -- Hardening sweep H3-H8. Bounds, guards, braces, scope, parity, persistence, determinism.
Stage 6 -- Orthogonal validation. For EVERY behavioural change report before/after discrimination against the 100-bar regression-R2 label, plus forward-R with its Bonferroni bar. Any change that cannot demonstrate improvement is REVERTED and the reversion is REPORTED.
Stage 7 -- Ghost gate. Invalidate stale state, full fresh calibration, Phase 6 ghost to verdict. This is the still-open S4 chain.
Stage 8 -- Hold. Demo only.

== HARD RULES ==
 - Live attach requires Manuel's explicit go-ahead AFTER he reads real numbers. If the ghost gate refuses, that is the architecture WORKING. Diagnose, report, hold. No autonomous re-arm loops.
 - Ship refutations. If a fix fails its orthogonal test, report the failure. An agent that reports only successes has stopped testing.
 - No absolute price fractions, pip constants, or unclamped magic numbers may enter the file.
 - Never validate a rule against a label derived from its own inputs.

Checkpoint relays after Stages 1, 2, 4 and a consolidated report at Stage 7.
